name: add_structured_logging_go
avoid: do not use global logger unless project already does
brief_template:
To add structured logging to a Go service:
1. Choose library: slog (stdlib), zap, or zerolog
2. Create internal/logger/ package with a constructor
3. Inject logger into handlers/services via dependency injection
4. Add request ID to context and log it in middleware
5. Use JSON output in production, text in development
